arquivos_criados.descricao: ArenaBaselineImpl - captures performance baseline for Arena Truco across all analyzers
16 comprehensive test cases for baseline capture

baseline_capture_features.multi_analyzer_aggregation: ✅ Aggregates Lighthouse, Bundle, Database, and Dead Code analyses
baseline_capture_features.lighthouse_integration: ✅ Captures performance scores and Core Web Vitals metrics
baseline_capture_features.bundle_analysis: ✅ Records bundle size, gzip size, chunk counts, and optimization issues
baseline_capture_features.database_analysis: ✅ Counts N+1 queries, batch opportunities, and ORM hints
baseline_capture_features.dead_code_detection: ✅ Aggregates unused exports, imports, and variables
baseline_capture_features.recommendation_engine: ✅ Generates actionable recommendations based on baseline data

analyzers.lighthouse: Performance scores + Core Web Vitals metrics
analyzers.bundle: Total size, gzipped size, chunks count, issues count
analyzers.database: N+1 query count, batch opportunities, ORM hints

recommendation_generation.performance: Alerts if Lighthouse score <90 with specific targets
recommendation_generation.bundle_size: Flags bundles >500KB gzipped with splitting suggestions
recommendation_generation.database: Recommends eager loading for N+1 patterns
recommendation_generation.dead_code: Suggests removing unused code to reduce bundle
recommendation_generation.high_priority: Emphasizes critical issues that impact performance

project_scanning.exclusion_patterns: ✅ Skips node_modules, .next, dist, build, hidden folders
project_scanning.error_resilience: ✅ Continues analysis even if individual files fail

test_coverage.recommendation_generation: ✅ Always generates at least one recommendation

integration_readiness.real_project_analysis: ✅ Ready to analyze actual Arena Truco project
integration_readiness.correlation_ready: ✅ Data structure compatible with correlation engine

next_steps.task_2_2_7: Correlation engine - map baseline issues to Sprint 1 detectors

notes: ArenaBaseline complete with comprehensive analysis aggregation. 16/16 tests passing. Ready to establish performance baseline for Arena Truco and track optimization progress across all analyzers. Next: Task 2.2.7 (correlation engine) to map baseline findings to underlying causes from Sprint 1.
